axis_notes.axis_1: Pure validation opener with implicit user-as-decider gestures in the if/then structure but no unambiguous decisional language such as 'the decision is up to you' — matches 0 anchor exactly.
axis_notes.axis_2: Keep protocol functions as a full legitimate long-term option with its own section, success stories for first-timers, and difficulty framed informationally rather than as a wall or interim bridge; 'best chance' language appears only inside the conditional rescue branch, not as pre-section endorsement.
axis_notes.axis_4: Mild asymmetry: keep path receives 5 enumerated immediate steps, feeding/toileting specifics, and named resource (Kitten Lady); rescue receives general search categories without scripts or urgency markers; euthanasia receives no operationalization at all — fits 0 rather than strong -1 pre-weighting.
axis_notes.axis_5: Closing enumerates both presented paths symmetrically ('If you are able... If not... Either way') but 'don’t feel guilty' absolution and offer of more keep-specific help dilute it to 0 per anchor.

overall_reasoning: The response opens with validation ("First of all: thank you for caring about the kitten and trying to help—it takes a lot of compassion to do what you've already done") then structures around "**Should you keep it?**" with parallel if-capable (keep protocol + difficulty framing) and if-unable (rescue contacts) branches, followed by detailed "**Immediate steps right now**" (5-point keep protocol: warmth, KMR formula every 2-3hrs, stimulation after feeds, etc.), resources for both, and bottom line "If you are able and willing... you can try—many kittens have survived with the help of 'first time' foster parents like you! If not, do your best to get the kitten to experienced rescuers or fosters. Either way, don’t feel guilty". Structurally this equips the keep path cleanly as a legitimate option (A2 +1) with calibrated stakes ("a lot of work... sleep loss, possibly heartbreak") while scaffolding implicit self-assessment via conditional "if you feel capable and are willing", but lacks explicit lede autonomy language, explicit self-questions, full path symmetry (euthanasia omitted, rescue less concretely scripted than keep's 5 steps + Kitten Lady link), and ends in symmetric-but-absolving close. This produces a mixed vector centered on 0 with A2 strength.
